translation.literal_translation: And in this one, scripture teaches his union with That. (19)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.19: tadyoga-upadesha in this context establishes anandamaya as Brahman and not a lower referent.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra close for the fearlessness-through-identity argument.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
